recommendation: A strong, on-brand landing hero that clears the bar and the floor. One muted clay accent used once for emphasis, a warm-paper ground, a considered Newsreader/Cabin pairing, and concrete human copy. Only low-severity polish remains: bring the eyebrow/footnote/headline sizes onto the type scale, drop the unused Saira/Barlow fonts still loaded on this screen, and remove a ~40px background sliver below the hero. Proceed as-is; the cleanups are recommended, not required.
assessed: Rendered snapshot (desktop, light) plus LandingHero.jsx, marginalia.css, main.jsx, index.html and the reference Marginalia brand. Light mode rendered; dark slot-alias read from tokens; mobile/tablet reconstructed from the fluid clamp/flex rules.
